'''Garron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] under the employment of crime lord [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

==Biography==
Garron worked with the female [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Vareth]]. Garron used his recently deceased parents' life insurance in the purchase of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Startled Circuit]]''.

They made their way to Tatooine, and Jabba's [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] was impressed enough with Garron and Vareth's skills that he offered them employment as spacers in the Hutt's criminal organization.<ref name="GG7" />
